scripts.check: cd cli && bun test && bunx tsc --noEmit && cd ../shared && bunx tsc --noEmit && cd ../web && bun test && bunx tsc --noEmit && bunx vite build && cd ../worker && bun run verify:test-runtime && bunx vitest run && bunx tsc --noEmit
scripts.release:verify: bun run check && cd worker && bun run verify:remote-schema
scripts.release:deploy: bun run check && cd worker && bun run deploy && bun run verify:remote-schema
